content: PostgreSQL partitioning: unique/primary key on partitioned table MUST include all partition key columns (limits dedup constraint design). Too many partitions = longer planning time + higher memory per session. Partition pruning needs WHERE on partition key. COPY FROM ignores rules but fires triggers. Append-only partitioned audit table + pgx.CopyFrom is fastest insert path. Hot partition (busy workspace) can still bottleneck under high insert rate.
